@release-it/conventional-changelog.header:
# Changelog
All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.
See the GitHub Releases page for detailed changelogs: https://github.com/amsyeung/notion-parse/releases

comments.issue: :rocket: _This issue has been resolved in v${version}. See [${releaseName}](${releaseUrl}) for release notes._
comments.pr: :rocket: _This pull request is included in v${version}. See [${releaseName}](${releaseUrl}) for release notes._

hooks.after:git:release: echo After git push, before github release
